description:
You are the on-call Operations Engineer. Two application servers suffered incidents yesterday and today, and your first job is to triage their logs so that development can start working on a fix.

Directory layout that already exists:
• /home/user/incident_logs/app_2023-07-15.log  
• /home/user/incident_logs/app_2023-07-16.log

Everything else you create must live under /home/user/output (create the directory if it is missing).

Business requirements
──────────────────────
1. Build a single file called
   /home/user/output/errors_combined.log  
   that contains ONLY the lines whose log-level is the literal word “ERROR”.
   • Keep the original timestamp, module name and message text exactly as they appear
     in the source log.
   • Anonymise any e-mail address that appears in the message body by replacing it
     with the literal string “[REDACTED]”.  
     (An e-mail address is anything that matches the classic user@host pattern and
     must be replaced entirely, e.g. “alice@example.com” → “[REDACTED]”.)
   • Lines must be in chronological order (i.e. the order in which they appear in
     the two source files when those files are concatenated, no re-sorting).
   • Terminate the file with a single trailing newline.

2. Produce a per-module CSV summary called
   /home/user/output/error_summary.csv  
   • The first row must be the header exactly:  
     Module,Count
   • Every subsequent row contains the module name (the text inside the square
     brackets) and the number of ERROR lines for that module.
   • Sort rows by Count in descending numeric order; if two modules have the same
     count, sort those modules alphabetically.
   • Use a single comma as the delimiter, no extra whitespace, and end the file
     with exactly one newline.

3. Write a concise human-readable report in
   /home/user/output/incident_report.txt  
   with EXACTLY the following two lines (and nothing else):
     Line 1: Total errors: <total_number_of_ERROR_lines>  
     Line 2: Top module: <module_name> (<count>)  
   Replace the angle-bracket placeholders with the real values you calculated.  
   Do NOT add additional spacing, punctuation or blank lines.

4. Tools constraint: accomplish all parsing and transformation using only awk
   and/or sed (you can combine them with standard shell redirection and pipes).
   Do not rely on grep, cut, perl, python, etc.  This is to test your mastery of
   awk/sed.

5. When you are done, print the contents of error_summary.csv followed by the
   contents of incident_report.txt to stdout so that the person paging you can
   see the numbers immediately.

The automated tests will check:
• That /home/user/output exists.  
• That the three files named above exist and are byte-for-byte identical to the
  required formats (header lines, ordering, newline termination, etc.).  
• That no email addresses remain in errors_combined.log.  
• That the numbers in the CSV and the report are internally consistent.

No root privileges are available, so stay within /home/user.  Good luck — time is of the essence!
truth:
<!-- Pre-existing files that the agent must read ----------------------------->
<seed_logs>
  <file path="/home/user/incident_logs/app_2023-07-15.log"><![CDATA[
2023-07-15 10:12:05,123 [auth] INFO User john@example.com logged in
2023-07-15 10:13:07,456 [payment] ERROR Failed payment for user jane.doe@example.com: insufficient funds
2023-07-15 10:15:00,789 [search] WARN Slow query
2023-07-15 10:16:12,321 [payment] ERROR Timeout contacting bank API
2023-07-15 10:18:45,654 [auth] ERROR Invalid password for user admin@example.com
2023-07-15 10:20:11,987 [inventory] INFO Stock updated
]]></file>

  <file path="/home/user/incident_logs/app_2023-07-16.log"><![CDATA[
2023-07-16 09:01:02,111 [auth] INFO User alice@example.com logged in
2023-07-16 09:05:33,222 [search] ERROR Null pointer in search index
2023-07-16 09:10:44,333 [payment] ERROR Currency conversion failed for user bob@example.com
2023-07-16 09:15:55,444 [auth] WARN Token nearing expiry
2023-07-16 09:20:06,555 [payment] ERROR Duplicate transaction detected
2023-07-16 09:25:17,666 [search] ERROR Failed to parse query "foo bar"
]]></file>
</seed_logs>

<!-- Expected artefacts after the agent finishes ---------------------------->
<expected_files>
  <file path="/home/user/output/errors_combined.log"><![CDATA[
2023-07-15 10:13:07,456 [payment] ERROR Failed payment for user [REDACTED]: insufficient funds
2023-07-15 10:16:12,321 [payment] ERROR Timeout contacting bank API
2023-07-15 10:18:45,654 [auth] ERROR Invalid password for user [REDACTED]
2023-07-16 09:05:33,222 [search] ERROR Null pointer in search index
2023-07-16 09:10:44,333 [payment] ERROR Currency conversion failed for user [REDACTED]
2023-07-16 09:20:06,555 [payment] ERROR Duplicate transaction detected
2023-07-16 09:25:17,666 [search] ERROR Failed to parse query "foo bar"
]]></file>

  <file path="/home/user/output/error_summary.csv"><![CDATA[
Module,Count
payment,4
search,2
auth,1
]]></file>

  <file path="/home/user/output/incident_report.txt"><![CDATA[
Total errors: 7
Top module: payment (4)
]]></file>
</expected_files>
